description: Complete the TCP Connection State Machine diagram in `~/Diagrams/tcp_state_machine.drawio` based on the RFC 793 reference provided in `~/Desktop/tcp_rfc793_state_machine.txt`. The final diagram must accurately reflect the RFC, containing exactly 11 states (including `FIN_WAIT_2`, `CLOSING`, `TIME_WAIT`, `CLOSE_WAIT`, and `LAST_ACK`) and all required transitions such as teardown sequences and the `Simultaneous Open` transition. Ensure the incorrect direct transition from `ESTABLISHED` to `CLOSED` is removed and all transitions are labeled with their corresponding events and actions. Export the final diagram as a PNG image to `~/Diagrams/tcp_state_machine.png`.
